programmes.show_description: This is CBBC! Tune every day from 7.00am.
Turf Wars. Animated Series. Battle ensues when the pigs muscle in on Shaun's private club and steal all the pizza. Shaun, Bitzer and the flock mount a rescue mission.
Attack of the Clowns. Animated series. Danger Mouse's uncontrollable laughter annoys a race of clown aliens so much that they invade Earth!
Cake Out. The heroes quest to find out who is behind a string of cake thefts, but they soon realise that there is more to this mystery than meets the eye.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: Double Trouble. Grizzy finds a giant home cinema screen.
Karen's Virus. Karen gets a computer virus.
Failure to Lunch. The Odd Squad investigates strange events. When the agents go to lunch, they struggle to relax and to ignore the oddness.
Lost. Tricked into a town-wide clean-up, Dennis and Walter are paired up against their will. However, they are forced to cooperate to survive in the wilderness of Beanotown Woods.
Plaster Disaster. Danny comes up with an elaborate excuse to get out of cleaning the gutters.
You Walked on Ceilings. We try using a gravity-bending black hole and spinning the earth faster to see if we can make it possible to walk on the ceiling..
...Science: Forces and Magnets. Learn about magnetic force, push-and-pull forces, and how magnets are used.
Go Slow. The brothers learn about animals that like to take things slowly. They discover the top speed of a giant African land snail and see just how slow a sleepy sloth can get.
Henry and Liz's Family Face-Off. Tudors King Henry VIII and daughter Queen Elizabeth I bicker about who was the best ruler.   Followed by Shark Bites.
Day of the Antique. Ricky's aunt has sent him an antique ornament, but it's disgusting so he can't wait to get rid of it. It does inspire him to make some timeless art though.
Earth and Space Special. Rapping science teacher Matt Green joins Pipette to host an Earth and space special.
Australia 1. Wildlife series. Steve heads into the blistering sun of the Australian outback to fulfil a lifelong dream of finding the most venomous snake in the world.
Explosive Spots! Things get explosive when Dr Chris and Dr Xand look at how spots are made, plus an incredible emergency service at work in Australia: the Flying Doctors.
Episode 8. Sketchy Comedy brings household objects to life and finds out what they're really thinking.
Odd Socks in the Hood. The Odd Socks go back in time to help the young Maid Marian rescue treasure from the wicked Sheriff of Nottingham.
Juniper at War. The Founders' Day dance takes Juniper back to 1944. Addie feels on top of the world, but a well-meaning mistake threatens to undo all her good work.
Seek and Ye Shall Find. Iain leads the search for the missing 209ers, while Ken, Jack and Amanda try to save themselves. Meanwhile, Madame's hunt for Margery puts her in danger.
The Vote Aoife Press. Aoife and Clanger run head-to-head for school president. When power-mad Clanger's supporters fall for his free donuts, begging Jessica for help might be Aoife's only hope.
United and Divided. Reality-style drama series. When TNS East and TNS West have a dance-off to determine home studio advantage for the coming battle, Elliot reveals his true colours.
The Remind Them Who's Captain Offense. Aoife has to fight to reclaim her captaincy - but at what cost to the Vipers?
Ocean Oddballs. Steve is underwater in Indonesia with funny-looking frogfish, a stargazer, flamboyant cuttlefish, a mimic octopus and a Bobbit worm.
Wanted. Animated series. The farm is paid an unexpected visit by an escapee from the nearby prison who takes refuge in the barn.
Blamjitsu Sensei. Convinced that Mrs Creecher is secretly a master of Blamjitsu, JJ persuades the gang to help trick her into revealing her blam credentials.
1,000th Quest. Hoofius's next quest will be his 1,000th, so he decides to wait for a really heroic one and insists that his friends quest without him.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: World Record Records. Mouse wants the other kids to stop being lazy and achieve some goals.

Lighthouse. Duck and Frog have to change a lighthouse's light bulb, but things soon go badly wrong.
Mustard O' Mine. The Krusty Krab runs out of mustard.
New Mexico, Old Monster. The gang travels to New Mexico and finds a giant ancient legendary bird.
Should Odd Acquaintance Be Forgotten, Part 1. When villains break into Odd Squad HQ, the agents must figure out where they're heading before they unleash oddness everywhere!
Tower Power. Cyborg plugs into Titans Tower and drives the others crazy.
Eyes to the Skies Once Again, Part 2. After a year apart, Roy visits Liko at Indigo Academy to ask for her help.

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: Bear Family. Grizzy finds a polar bear and realises they are from the same species.
Back to School. The seniors face three rounds of auditions to test their singing, dancing and acting skills. Meanwhile, Naira is on a mission to show off her Indian heritage.
The Big Battle Badge. Tilda and Ginny race to Brighthawk Camp with aliens in pursuit, while Kiara rallies the troops for battle - can the Brighthawks defend their camp against aliens?
Danger Zone. Reality-style drama following the lives of a group of dancers at the Next Step Dance Studio. Riley asks James for an impossible favour for the studio.
Make Your Own Gladiator's Helmet with Cyclone. Gladiator Cyclone and Hacker T Dog show how to make a Gladiator's helmet.

Herbert Goldenbeard. Herbert is loving the attention his newly oiled beard is getting, until it causes him to get kidnapped, and his friends have to quest to rescue him!

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: Happy Birthday Grizzy! Grizzy wants a peaceful day for his birthday, but the Lemmings have other plans.
The Grill Is Gone. A gang of kids steal the Krusty Krab's grill.
The O Team. The Odd Squad investigates strange events. Security agents Owen and Ohio secretly provide backup on a case so they can have a pizza party.
The Great Beanotown Comic Con. The gang produce a hand-drawn comic which is a surprise hit all round Beanotown.
Wheely Silly. Danny's really wants a new bike for his birthday.
You Were the Last Person on Earth. What would the planet be like if all other humans disappeared, leaving you as the last person on earth?

programmes.show_name: Bitesize Daily: 8-9 Year Olds: Science: Electricity
programmes.show_description: Learn about simple circuits, circuit symbols, conductors, and solving electrical problems.
Eco-Heroes. Looking to help protect the planet, Cam, Tyler and Aaron take inspiration from the zoo's animal eco-heroes, including pygmy marmosets, Amur tigers and orangutans.
Cursed Careers. Pirate or puritan policeman? Rattus tries to find the perfect job from history.   Followed by Shark Bites.
Day of the Grand High Ninja. Ricky is forced to renew his ninja licence with the grand high ninja and his friends and family try to boost his skills.
Working Scientifically Special. A special guide to working scientifically, whether that involves drinking black vomit, measuring people's farts, or firing arrows into their bum.
New Zealand. Wildlife series. Steve and the team head to New Zealand for the first time, where Steve descends deep into the Waitomo caves to find an unusual predator.
Feeling Nervous! Find out how fast your nerves work in a snotty experiment that sees Dr Xand blow a fuse, and the Cupboard of Everything is time travelling to a very smelly Victorian street!
Episode 9. Comedy sketch show. A cucumber, a golf ball, a phone and a pan of sprouts are among the items getting the Sketchy treatment!
Planet Rock. Rio has lost his air guitar and his confidence. The band travel through space to take him home to Planet Rock to see the Godfather of Rock, who will help him get them back.
Runaway. With everyone in Juniper looking for them, Addie follows runaway Bonnie to the seaside. Addie knows she must convince Bonnie to go home - but how?
Between a Rock and a Hard Place. The 209ers need to save Madame by stealing the crown jewels from Edinburgh Castle!
The House Partaaaay Play. Mum is away with Jim, so it's party time! Will Aoife finally get together with Jamie?
East Meets West. Reality-style drama series. Emily has a secret weapon in the dance battle to determine which troupe will get to represent The Next Step at regionals.
The Autograph Play. Aoife fakes an injury to meet her hero - but how far will she take the lie?
King for a Day Challenge. Little Bro Callum sets Adam and Joe another epic quest: become a king, build the best cardboard castle, and defend your kingdom against the destructive dragon!
Going Wild Challenge. Joe and Adam turn to their survival instincts in this gungy, funny battle to be top dog!
Rude Dude. Animated Series. When the farmer's rock 'n' roll idol is stranded at the farm after his limousine breaks down, he is revealed as a spoilt pretender.
Molar Power. Doctor Pfooflepfeffer covets the world-beating power of Gnasher's indestructible teeth and will stop at nothing to get her hands on one of those doggy dental marvels.
Good Clean Fun. When the heroes are sent on a quest to prevent an ogre from making a mess of the village green, Trevor's smart mouth puts them all in danger.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: Cat Beard. When one of Mouse's inventions accidentally sticks Cat's discarded fur to Boy's face, his new 'beard' suddenly makes him the most popular kid in school.

Cinema. When Duck gets a job in a cinema projection room, Frog manages to accidentally break the projector. Can Frog save the day and entertain the audience himself?
Whale Watching. Mr Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl.
It's All Greek to Scooby. A medallion that Shaggy wears apparently causes an ancient myth to come to life.
Should Odd Acquaintance Be Forgotten, Part 2. With oddness unleashed in HQ and across town, Ozzie and Orli must find enough agents to help shut the containment units.
Parasite. Starfire's new pet is a horribly dangerous parasite.
Following Traces of Laquium. Liko, Roy and Dot investigate a report of Pokémon affected by Laquium.

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: The Ten Plagues of Grizzy. The Lemmings discover an ancestral tree that casts maledictions.
The Competition. Dancer Jakob has trained so hard to earn a place at one of the world's most prestigious international ballet competitions - but will his hard work be worth it?
The Neutralisation Badge. The Brighthawks try to hide the aliens from Orbit, while Ruby makes a shocking discovery.
Rivalry. Reality-style drama following the lives of a group of dancers at the Next Step Dance Studio. James and Alfie represent the Next Step at the final qualifier.
Who Will Win the Adaptive Skiing Challenge? Abby and Shini hit the slopes to try adaptive skiing with Ellie Henry.
